form.formComment: Useful mare. Freshened for 50 days. Last start finished third in a small field at Thurles in the LR on February 19 over 4325m, 22 len behind Karia Des Blaises with 67.5kg at $2.50. The run before finished fourth of 8 starters at Naas in the G3 Finlay Ford At Naas Novice Steeplechase on January 25 over 4928m, on rain affected going; 20 len behind Argento Boy with 66.5kg at $6.50. Well-placed to take this out.

form.formComment: Comes off a 47 day let-up. Last outing finished ninth of 12 runners at Naas in the LR on February 22 over 4023m, in the wet; 26 len behind Goraibhmaithagat carrying 73kg at $41. form.formComment: Last run won by 11 len Limerick on March 31 over 3922m on rain affected going defeating Shanroe Act with 66.5kg at $8 in a steeplechase.
